_comment: Vikash's own systems. The Gap Scout agent compares notable discovered repos against THIS to answer: what capability are these repos showing that my stack lacks, and how do I adopt it? Keep this honest and current — it is the mirror the gap analysis holds up.
owner: Vikash Rajan — Head of Global Operations, Redpin Payments (Mumbai)

systems.name: Redpin Payments Ops
systems.stack: Internal ops tooling, SWIFT/BACS/CHAPS/TT, ACH/NACHA monitoring
capabilities: Cross-border FX + payment processing across 7 regions

systems.name: GitHub Intelligence Station
systems.stack: Python pipeline + GitHub Search API + Anthropic Claude, GitHub Actions + Pages
capabilities: 5-agent pipeline: Scout, Analyst, Connector, Briefer, Gap Scout
Notability axis so off-thesis repos survive
looking_for: Persistent memory of past picks + feedback-driven weighting
Better discovery sources beyond GitHub Search

systems.name: Reel IQ
capabilities: YouTube Shorts / TikTok / Instagram Reels performance analytics

systems.name: NIFTY + Global Markets
capabilities: NIFTY CE/PE options, first 5-minute candle, intraday momentum
looking_for: Risk models, portfolio rebalancing, quant strategy code

systems.name: Automation Stack
capabilities: Workflow automation across personal + ops tasks
looking_for: Anything that reduces manual ops at Redpin
Agent frameworks, MCP servers, Claude Code skills to wire in
